LLP, Chartered Accountants, Statutory Auditors for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026, which have been duly reviewed and recommended by the Audit Committee and Recommendation of dividend @470% i.e. Rs. 47/- per equity share of face value of ?10/- each for the Financial Year 2025-26 subject to approval of members at the ensuing Annual General Meeting.
